questions.question: List all the fields that are used to uniquely identify an employee in the EMPNO table.
questions.hint: EMPNO, Department, Salary, Date of Joining

questions.question: Explain the significance of the EMPNO field in the context of a database management system.
questions.hint: EMPNO is a unique identifier for each employee, used to store and manage employee information efficiently.

questions.question: Write a SQL query to retrieve the names of all employees whose salary is greater than the average salary of all employees.
questions.hint: SELECT Name FROM Employees WHERE Salary > (SELECT AVG(Salary) FROM Employees)
